purpose: The single Setup-stage step: capture the founder's fuzzy idea in their own words and hand off to shaping.

contains.text-intent: specforge brand mark — orients the user to where they are; deliberately no nav, so nothing pulls off the one step
The single instruction: describe your idea in your own words
One line of value-framing reassurance that a rough, fuzzy, half-formed idea is exactly what is expected — lowers the 'is my idea good enough' hesitation (drop-off #2, a motivation bumper)
A worked example of the kind of fuzzy input specforge shapes, so the founder is not staring at a blank box (drop-off #1, an ability bumper) — one example, not a picker
Free-text intake for the fuzzy idea, typed or pasted — captures object:shaping.idea-seed.text (required); a non-empty but thin idea is passed through, not validated here
The one primary action — commit the idea, create the product from the seed, and move to shaping
